Who We Are

Why Zentrix?

We build world-class products that make a real difference. Here's what makes us different.

💡
Innovation First
We encourage every team member to think big, experiment boldly, and build solutions that push technology forward.
🌱
Grow Together
Continuous learning, mentorship programs, and a culture that invests in your long-term professional growth.
🌐
Real Impact
Your work reaches millions. We build products used across industries, creating measurable impact at scale.
Life at Zentrix

Why Join Zentrix?

More than a job — a place to grow, build, and thrive.

🌟
Innovation Culture
We encourage bold ideas and give you the freedom to experiment, fail fast, and build things that matter.
🚀
Fast Career Growth
Clear growth paths, quarterly reviews, mentorship from industry leaders, and a learning budget for every employee.
🎁
Great Perks
Competitive pay, health insurance, flexible hours, remote-friendly culture, and team retreats twice a year.
⚖️
Work-Life Balance
Unlimited PTO policy, mental wellness support, and a team that respects your time outside of work.
Join Us

Open Positions

Find your next role and make an impact with our growing team.

Quick Answers

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about applying at Zentrix.

Our typical process takes 2-3 weeks from application to final decision. Initial review happens within 3-5 business days. Shortlisted candidates are contacted for further steps.

Yes, you can apply to multiple positions. We recommend applying to roles that genuinely match your skills and experience for the best chance of success.

You'll need your resume (PDF/DOC), Aadhaar card (front and back), PAN card, a recent selfie, and your bank passbook. These are required for all applications.

After submitting, you'll receive a unique Tracking ID (e.g. ZTX17234567890). Use the "Track Application" page and enter your ID to view your current status anytime.

We offer a mix of remote, hybrid, and on-site roles. The work model for each position is listed on the job card. Look for "Remote" or "Hybrid" in the job details.

Building next-generation technology solutions with passionate innovators from around the world.

What happens next?
1
Application Review — Our team reviews your profile within 3-5 business days.
2
Shortlisting — Shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email or phone.
3
Interview — Attend a brief interview with our hiring team.
4
Final Decision — We share our decision and move forward together.
